title: VS More Modded Masses
description: Adds weights for modded blocks to Valkyrien Skies 2
body:
## Everything too heavy?
This is a common issue with modded blocks in Valkyrien Skies, a simple fix is to change the default blockweight, however it can be a bit unrealistic with some mods, this datapack adds block weights for the 27 mods found in [Mogwump's VS2 Fork](https://github.com/Mogwump/Valkyrien-Skies-2/tree/44ba7dd1fa80df4cb2ae928ce160cebf96014341/common/src/main/resources/data/valkyrienskies/vs_mass/compat).
